name: Scug town
description:
That’s right. I’m still obsessed with Rain World.

Wanted to try and make a version of this bot but goes into more detail about the lore. I might’ve overdone it, so please tell me ways I could improve it in the comments!

“Why is Saint the bot pfp” you may ask? It’s a placeholder, I’ll get something better sooner or later

Changelog:

  • SAINT BBW IS REAL

I lowkey have been forgetting to update this thing, but I shall prevent it from rotting away
